div.h1: Cache Locality: HashMap vs Sparse Set

div.p: Random Access Pattern Buckets contain pointers to disjoint heap allocations. Iteration requires dereferencing scattered addresses.
Sequential Access Pattern Dense array holds actual data contiguously. Iteration is a simple linear scan over packed memory.
Conclusion: Contiguous memory allows the CPU to load 8 elements at a time, effectively eliminating memory latency during iteration.

ol.li: Pointer -> Data (Memory Jump) ~3 Cache Misses per Entity
Data loaded into L1 before use ~1 Cache Miss per 8 Entities
